name: openclaw-twitter-post-engage-plugin
description: Native-first ClawHub plugin for `openclaw-twitter-post-engage`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Search X/Twitter profiles, tweets, trends, and OAuth-gated posting through AIsa. Use when: the user needs Twitter research, monitoring, or engagement workflows. Supports search, monitoring, and approved posting.
